issues.title: Enemy dealt 39 dmg (87% of 45 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 2, turn 25 (seq 133), the enemy dealt 39 damage which is 87% of the player's 45 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Enemy dealt 42 dmg (100% of 42 HP) on floor 1
issues.description: On floor 1, encounter 2, turn 26 (seq 137), the enemy dealt 42 damage which is 100% of the player's 42 HP before the hit. This exceeds the 50% threshold for a single enemy turn.
issues.suggestedFix: Cap single-hit enemy damage to 50% of player current HP or add damage-reduction mechanics.

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 (bone_collector)
issues.description: Player was defeated on floor 1, encounter 2 against bone_collector (mini_boss). Accuracy was 47% with 26 turns played. Early defeat suggests difficulty may be too high for this profile.
issues.suggestedFix: Reduce early floor enemy HP/damage or activate canary system earlier for struggling profiles.

issues.title: HP crashed from 100 to 6 in floor 1 encounter 2
issues.description: During floor 1, encounter 2, player HP dropped from 100 to 6. Going from >70 to <20 in one encounter feels punishing and unfun.

issues.title: Card type "wild" was never played during the entire run
issues.description: The card type "wild" had 0 plays across the entire run (94 total cards played). This may indicate the type is not appearing in decks, not being offered, or players are avoiding it.
reproductionSteps: Check deck composition — does "wild" appear in the card pool?
